prestazioni: Engine: 3.6L PT (engine code: PT 3.6 V8 32V) with forged internals including Mahle Motorsport pistons (8.5:1 compression), Carrillo H-beam connecting rods, and a billet crankshaft from Manley Performance. Upgraded to a custom Schrick 272° camshaft profile with titanium retainers and dual valve springs from Supertech Performance.

Forced Induction: Twin-turbo setup using Garrett GT35R turbos (8465-5003S) with custom 3.5-inch stainless steel exhaust manifolds by Tubular Automotive, paired with a GReddy Type-S intercooler and a custom 3-inch aluminum charge piping system. Fueling upgraded with Bosch 044 high-flow fuel pumps, Siemens DEKA 80lb injectors, and a Motec M800 ECU for standalone engine management.

Drivetrain: Quattro Sport differential (89Q) with a 40% lockup rate, paired with a reinforced 01E 6-speed manual transmission (from the RS2) with a Sachs Performance twin-disc clutch (380mm) and a lightweight flywheel from Fidanza. Custom half-shafts by The Driveshaft Shop with CV joints rated for 800+ lb-ft of torque.
estetica: Body: Full carbon fiber widebody conversion using a custom-made kit by Prior Design (PD-GT80), including extended front fenders, rear quarter panels, and a custom front splitter with integrated canards. Rear diffuser by Maxton Design with dual exhaust cutouts for the custom 3.5-inch titanium exhaust by Akrapovic.

Suspension: Full Ohlins Road & Track coilovers (DFV) with adjustable camber plates and spherical bearings, paired with Eibach Pro-Spacer wheel spacers (20mm front, 25mm rear) for aggressive stance. Custom subframe reinforcement plates by 034 Motorsport to handle increased power and cornering forces.

Interior: Full Recaro Pole Position seats with custom Alcantara and red stitching, paired with a MOMO Mod.78 steering wheel (350mm) and a custom roll cage by Matter Fab (8-point, bolt-in) for chassis rigidity. Digital dash upgrade using an AiM MXL2 data logger with integrated boost and wideband AFR gauges.
